creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, thank you for using FreeBSD! Yes we can help you with Radius 
authentication and things. Please ask around on the 
Questions@FreeBSD.org mailinglist and you'l get pointers. This is not a 
bug but a user question (yes it is). I'll close the ticket because you 
got pointed to questions@ by me :-) goodluck and again thanks!!
